message:
test: add e2e integration tests exercising full agent system

5 ordered tests sharing a genome directory across sessions:
1. Bootstrap — fresh genome, file creation via real LLM
2. Multi-step — file modification and test creation
3. Stumble/learn — failure signal triggers genome mutation
4. Genome growth — verify content grew beyond bootstrap
5. Cross-session — new session loads and uses learned genome

All tests use real Anthropic API calls with generous timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
